title: 日本語チャンネル結尾テンプレート

youtube.publish_title: Japanese Channel Closing Template | 日本語チャンネル結尾テンプレート
in_this_episode_you_will_learn: How to close an episode naturally in Japanese.
How to ask for likes and subscriptions in a gentle way.
How to end with a warm practice-oriented message.
description_intro: This is a short Japanese closing template for the podcast channel.
It focuses on a natural wrap-up, a like-and-subscribe reminder, and encouragement to keep practicing Japanese.

blocks.purpose: 高評価とチャンネル登録をお願いしつつ自然に締める

segments.speaker: female
segments.en: If today's episode was helpful, please subscribe to the channel and leave a like.
segments.text: 今日の内容が役に立ったら、チャンネル登録と高評価をお願いします。

segments.speaker: male
segments.en: Your support gives us the strength to keep this going.
segments.text: みなさんの応援があると、これからも続ける力になります。

segments.speaker: female
segments.en: All right, let's practice Japanese together again next time.
segments.text: では、また次回もいっしょに日本語を練習しましょう。
